mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO images (target_type, target_id, image_url, original_name, sort_order) VALUES
( #{image.target_type}, #{image.target_id}, #{image.image_url}, #{image.original_name}, #{image.sort_order} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM images WHERE target_type = 'REVIEW' AND target_id = #{id}

SELECT * FROM images WHERE target_type = 'REVIEW' AND target_id IN
#{id}
SELECT image_id, target_type, target_id, image_url, original_name, sort_order, created_at FROM images WHERE target_type = 'PRODUCT' AND target_id = #{product_id} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
